TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-pear_temi 2020s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: ah prengoku kari a oda nodaan kesaun nasi.
S.PHON: aħ pɾeŋoku kaɾi a oda nodaan kesaun nasi.
S.FORM: ah prengoku kari a oda nodaan kesaun nasi.
S.PHON: aħ pɾeŋoku kaɾi a oda nodaan kesaun nasi.
S.TRANSL: 我要說一個跟梨子有關的故事.
I am going to tell a story about pears.

S.FORM: ah eniqan kingan rudan ah meepah a neepahna mhuma nasi.
S.PHON: aħ eniqan kiŋan ɾudan aħ meepaħ a neepaħna mħuma nasi.
S.FORM: ah eniqan kingan rudan ah meepah a neepahna mhuma nasi.
S.PHON: aħ eniqan kiŋan ɾudan aħ meepaħ a neepaħna mħuma nasi.

TRANSL.notes: 有一位老人在旱田工作,(就是)種梨子.

S.TRANSL: 有一位老人在旱田工作, 種梨子.
There is an old man working in the field, planting pears.

S.FORM: ma paru nasina di musa lmamu nasi rudan kiya.
S.PHON: ma paɾu nasina di musa lmamu nasi ɾudan kija.
S.FORM: ma paru nasina di musa lmamu nasi rudan kiya.
S.PHON: ma paɾu nasina di musa lmamu nasi ɾudan kija.
S.TRANSL: 梨子長大時,老人就去摘.
When pears grow big, that old man goes to pick them up.

S.FORM: musa mdakin eniqan kingan madis hako ma mdakin ni ah lmiqu ah musa angalunna ka angalunna ka nasi posaunna berahna hiya.
S.PHON: musa mdakin eniqan kiŋan madis ħako ma mdakin ni aħ lmiqu aħ musa aŋalunna ka aŋalunna ka nasi posaunna beɾaħna ħija.
S.FORM: musa mdakin eniqan kingan madis hako ma mdakin ni ah lmiqu ah musa angalunna ka angalunna ka nasi posaunna berahna hiya.
S.PHON: musa mdakin eniqan kiŋan madis ħako ma mdakin ni aħ lmiqu aħ musa aŋalunna ka aŋalunna ka nasi posaunna beɾaħna ħija.
S.TRANSL: 他去爬... 他有拿梯子,然後他爬山去拿梨子,放在胸前那裡.
He goes to climb... there is a ladder that he brought there. Then, he climbs up the mountain to get pears and put them on the front.

S.FORM: ma ciida rudan kii teru ah rawana teru rawa nadisna posaunna nasi.
S.PHON: ma ʦiida ɾudan kii teɾu aħ ɾawana teɾu ɾawa nadisna posaunna nasi.
S.FORM: ma ciida rudan kii teru ah rawana teru rawa nadisna posaunna nasi.
S.PHON: ma ʦiida ɾudan kii teɾu aħ ɾawana teɾu ɾawa nadisna posaunna nasi.
S.TRANSL: 那時候那個老人... 三個籃子... 帶三個籃子放梨子.
At that time, that old man... three baskets... carries three baskets to hold pears.

S.FORM: ma ga lmamu baro ka baki kii.
S.PHON: ma ga lmamu baɾo ka baki kii.
S.FORM: ma ga lmamu baro ka baki kii.
S.PHON: ma ga lmamu baɾo ka baki kii.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人正在上面採梨子.
That old man is picking up pears above.

S.FORM: ma mnoda hiya kingan seediq mnoda kingan a riso.
S.PHON: ma mnoda ħija kiŋan seediq mnoda kiŋan a ɾiso.
S.FORM: ma mnoda hiya kingan seediq mnoda kingan a riso.
S.PHON: ma mnoda ħija kiŋan seediq mnoda kiŋan a ɾiso.
S.TRANSL: 然後那邊經過一個人.一個年輕男子經過.
Then there passed a person, a young boy.

S.FORM: madis ah dmudun ah miric kesaun.
S.PHON: madis aħ dmudun aħ miɾiʦ kesaun.
S.FORM: madis ah dmudun ah miric kesaun.
S.PHON: madis aħ dmudun aħ miɾiʦ kesaun.
S.TRANSL: 他牽... 帶領叫做羊的.
he carries... leads a sheep.

S.FORM: ma inina qitai rudan gaga mangan nasi ah qhuni baro.
S.PHON: ma inina qitai ɾudan gaga maŋan nasi aħ qħuni baɾo.
S.FORM: ma inina qitai rudan gaga mangan nasi ah qhuni baro.
S.PHON: ma inina qitai ɾudan gaga maŋan nasi aħ qħuni baɾo.
S.TRANSL: 然後他沒看到在樹上採梨子的老人.
He does not see the old man that is picking up pears in the tree.

S.FORM: wada asi oda hiya ini prengo duri mhm.
S.PHON: wada asi oda ħija ini pɾeŋo duɾi mħm.
S.FORM: wada asi oda hiya ini prengo duri mhm.
S.PHON: wada asi oda ħija ini pɾeŋo duɾi mħm.
S.TRANSL: 他去... 他經過那裡也沒有說話.

TRANSL.notes: He goes... he passes there without speaking (to the old man).

S.TRANSL: He goes... he passes there without speaking .

S.FORM: bobona ini qbsyaq moda hiya ka kingan laqi rseno.
S.PHON: bobona ini qbsjaq moda ħija ka kiŋan laqi ɾseno.
S.FORM: bobona ini qbsyaq moda hiya ka kingan laqi rseno.
S.PHON: bobona ini qbsjaq moda ħija ka kiŋan laqi ɾseno.
S.TRANSL: 後來不久之後,男孩經過.
After that, in a short while, a boy passes by.

S.FORM: ah taapa rulu rulu biciq.
S.PHON: aħ taapa ɾulu ɾulu biʦiq.
S.FORM: ah taapa rulu rulu biciq.
S.PHON: aħ taapa ɾulu ɾulu biʦiq.
S.TRANSL: 他騎腳踏車... 小的腳踏車.

TRANSL.notes: (He) rides a bike... a small bike.

S.TRANSL: rides a bike... a small bike.

S.FORM: ma ini inina qitai ka rudan ga lmamu nasi duri.
S.PHON: ma ini inina qitai ka ɾudan ga lmamu nasi duɾi.
S.FORM: ma ini inina qitai ka rudan ga lmamu nasi duri.
S.PHON: ma ini inina qitai ka ɾudan ga lmamu nasi duɾi.
S.TRANSL: 然後他也沒看採梨子的老人.
Then he also does not see the old man who is picking up pears.

S.FORM: anisi laqi rseno kii ma qitaanna rawana egu nasi ma uh qumi ma mkmangan nasi laqi kii mesa uka seediq qmita icin ma inina qitai rudan ga baro.
S.PHON: anisi laqi ɾseno kii ma qitaanna ɾawana egu nasi ma uħ qumi ma mkmaŋan nasi laqi kii mesa uka seediq qmita iʦin ma inina qitai ɾudan ga baɾo.
S.FORM: anisi laqi rseno kii ma qitaanna rawana egu nasi ma uh qumi ma mkmangan nasi laqi kii mesa uka seediq qmita icin ma inina qitai rudan ga baro.
S.PHON: anisi laqi ɾseno kii ma qitaanna ɾawana egu nasi ma uħ qumi ma mkmaŋan nasi laqi kii mesa uka seediq qmita iʦin ma inina qitai ɾudan ga baɾo.
S.TRANSL: 但是那個小孩看有許多梨子的籃子,然後想要拿梨子,看旁邊有沒有人,然後他沒有看到老人在上面.
But that child sees his basket full of pears. That child wants to take pears, and observe if there is anyone else here. He still does not see the old man above.

S.FORM: ma kiya ka wadana asi didil wadana asi didil ka kingan rawa nasi ma posaanna ruluna kiya ka wada ka laqi kii di.
S.PHON: ma kija ka wadana asi didil wadana asi didil ka kiŋan ɾawa nasi ma posaanna ɾuluna kija ka wada ka laqi kii di.
S.FORM: ma kiya ka wadana asi didil wadana asi didil ka kingan rawa nasi ma posaanna ruluna kiya ka wada ka laqi kii di.
S.PHON: ma kija ka wadana asi didil wadana asi didil ka kiŋan ɾawa nasi ma posaanna ɾuluna kija ka wada ka laqi kii di.
S.TRANSL: 所以他帶... 帶一個梨子籃,然後放在他的腳踏車,然後那個小孩離開了.
Therefore, he takes... takes one pear basket and puts it on his bike. Then that child leaves.

S.FORM: ma sterung ini qbsyaq ka nosaanna laqi rseno kii moda elu gisu kiya laqi mqedin.
S.PHON: ma steɾuŋ ini qbsjaq ka nosaanna laqi ɾseno kii moda elu gisu kija laqi mqedin.
S.FORM: ma sterung ini qbsyaq ka nosaanna laqi rseno kii moda elu gisu kiya laqi mqedin.
S.PHON: ma steɾuŋ ini qbsjaq ka nosaanna laqi ɾseno kii moda elu gisu kija laqi mqedin.
S.TRANSL: 然後不久之後,男孩離開了.中途女孩過來那邊.
Then in a short while, that boy leaves. A girl comes up.

S.FORM: laqi mqedin gisu ma anu qmita bukuy ka riso qmita weewa.
S.PHON: laqi mqedin gisu ma anu qmita bukuj ka ɾiso qmita weewa.
S.FORM: laqi mqedin gisu ma anu qmita bukuy ka riso qmita weewa.
S.PHON: laqi mqedin gisu ma anu qmita bukuj ka ɾiso qmita weewa.
S.TRANSL: 女孩靠過來,然後那個男孩看背後看女孩.
The girl is getting closer, and that boy looks at the girl over his shoulder.

S.FORM: qmita weewa ka riso kii ma anu wada asi osa laqi mqedin kii ma wada ptatuk.
S.PHON: qmita weewa ka ɾiso kii ma anu wada asi osa laqi mqedin kii ma wada ptatuk.
S.FORM: qmita weewa ka riso kii ma anu wada asi osa laqi mqedin kii ma wada ptatuk.
S.PHON: qmita weewa ka ɾiso kii ma anu wada asi osa laqi mqedin kii ma wada ptatuk.
S.TRANSL: 那個男孩看女孩的時候... 那?樣地很快地... 那個女孩離開的時候,他撞到.
When that boy sees the girl in that way, quickly... When the girl leaves, he bumps into something.

S.FORM: ah wada sbgihurun ka so bo ah ah maanu di ah bosina bosina ma kiya ka wada tuting di.
S.PHON: aħ wada sbgiħuɾun ka so bo aħ aħ maanu di aħ bosina bosina ma kija ka wada tutiŋ di.
S.FORM: ah wada sbgihurun ka so bo ah ah maanu di ah bosina bosina ma kiya ka wada tuting di.
S.PHON: aħ wada sbgiħuɾun ka so bo aħ aħ maanu di aħ bosina bosina ma kija ka wada tutiŋ di.
S.TRANSL: 然後風吹... 那個叫什?的... 他的帽子... 然後他的帽子掉路上了.
The wind blows and... what does it call? His hat, and his hat fallss down on the road.

S.FORM: qn mita bukuy nana ma inina kelai ka btunux gaga gaga berah odana.
S.PHON: qn mita bukuj nana ma inina kelai ka btunux gaga gaga beɾaħ odana.
S.FORM: qn mita bukuy nana ma inina kelai ka btunux gaga gaga berah odana.
S.PHON: qn mita bukuj nana ma inina kelai ka btunux gaga gaga beɾaħ odana.
S.TRANSL: 還在看背後的時候,他不知道前面路上有石頭.
While he looks back over his shoulder, he does not know that there is a stone in his front.

S.FORM: kiya ka asi osa ptabuk btunux ka ah ruluna di.
S.PHON: kija ka asi osa ptabuk btunux ka aħ ɾuluna di.
S.FORM: kiya ka asi osa ptabuk btunux ka ah ruluna di.
S.PHON: kija ka asi osa ptabuk btunux ka aħ ɾuluna di.
S.TRANSL: 然後他的腳踏車撞到石頭.
Then his bike bumps into a stone.

S.FORM: ma takun ruluna takun heya duri takun kana so nasi nanganna.
S.PHON: ma takun ɾuluna takun ħeja duɾi takun kana so nasi naŋanna.
S.FORM: ma takun ruluna takun heya duri takun kana so nasi nanganna.
S.PHON: ma takun ɾuluna takun ħeja duɾi takun kana so nasi naŋanna.
S.TRANSL: 然後他的腳踏車跌倒,他也跌倒.
Then his bike falls down and so does he.

S.FORM: takun dheran wada s ah wada cuwak dheran kana ka nasi nanganna.
S.PHON: takun dħeɾan wada s aħ wada ʦuwak dħeɾan kana ka nasi naŋanna.
S.FORM: takun dheran wada s ah wada cuwak dheran kana ka nasi nanganna.
S.PHON: takun dħeɾan wada s aħ wada ʦuwak dħeɾan kana ka nasi naŋanna.
S.TRANSL: 拿過的所有的梨子摔到地上.拿過的所有的梨子翻落在地上.
All the pears that are taken away fall onto the ground. All the pears taken get scattered on the ground.

S.FORM: ye mnarux papakna laqi kii nii ini asi tutui.
S.PHON: je mnaɾux papakna laqi kii nii ini asi tutui.
S.FORM: ye mnarux papakna laqi kii nii ini asi tutui.
S.PHON: je mnaɾux papakna laqi kii nii ini asi tutui.
S.TRANSL: 也許那個... 這個男孩腳受傷,沒有馬上起來.
perhaps that.. this boy hurts his foot, so he does not get up soon.

S.FORM: ma ini qbsiyaq gisu teru laqi lmiqu te laqi bi ah laqi rseno teru ma qitaandaha.
S.PHON: ma ini qbsijaq gisu teɾu laqi lmiqu te laqi bi aħ laqi ɾseno teɾu ma qitaandaħa.
S.FORM: ma ini qbsiyaq gisu teru laqi lmiqu te laqi bi ah laqi rseno teru ma qitaandaha.
S.PHON: ma ini qbsijaq gisu teɾu laqi lmiqu te laqi bi aħ laqi ɾseno teɾu ma qitaandaħa.

TRANSL.notes: 不久之後三個小孩過來... 山上... 小孩... 三個男孩.然後他們看到(他).

S.TRANSL: 不久之後三個小孩過來... 山上... 小孩... 三個男孩.然後他們看到 .

TRANSL.notes: In a short while, three boys come close, and then they look (at him).

S.TRANSL: In a short while, three boys come close, and then they look .

S.FORM: ma so hari ga mhm so mnarux ka papak laqi kii ma meyah lngelungandaha dayoota mesa.
S.PHON: ma so ħaɾi ga mħm so mnaɾux ka papak laqi kii ma mejaħ lŋeluŋandaħa dajoota mesa.
S.FORM: ma so hari ga mhm so mnarux ka papak laqi kii ma meyah lngelungandaha dayoota mesa.
S.PHON: ma so ħaɾi ga mħm so mnaɾux ka papak laqi kii ma mejaħ lŋeluŋandaħa dajoota mesa.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個小孩好像腳痛.他們靠過來想說「我們幫忙吧.」

TRANSL.notes: It seems that that child's foot hurts. They approach him and have sympathy with him, thinking "let's help (him)".

S.TRANSL: It seems that that child's foot hurts. They approach him and have sympathy with him, thinking "let's help ".

S.FORM: kiya ka dmayo ka laqi eh ah laqi teru kii peni.
S.PHON: kija ka dmajo ka laqi eħ aħ laqi teɾu kii peni.
S.FORM: kiya ka dmayo ka laqi eh ah laqi teru kii peni.
S.PHON: kija ka dmajo ka laqi eħ aħ laqi teɾu kii peni.

TRANSL.notes: 所以小孩們幫忙... 三個小孩(幫忙).

S.TRANSL: 所以小孩們幫忙... 三個小孩 .
So the children help him.

S.FORM: kinga daha dmayo ma kingan ini dayo ga naq cmebu ah cubuna kingan ma.
S.PHON: kiŋa daħa dmajo ma kiŋan ini dajo ga naq ʦmebu aħ ʦubuna kiŋan ma.
S.FORM: kinga daha dmayo ma kingan ini dayo ga naq cmebu ah cubuna kingan ma.
S.PHON: kiŋa daħa dmajo ma kiŋan ini dajo ga naq ʦmebu aħ ʦubuna kiŋan ma.
S.TRANSL: 一個... 兩個小孩幫忙,然後一個沒有幫忙.他自己拍拍他的球.
one... two children help him. Then one child does not offer help, and he is just patting his ball alone.

S.FORM: daha du dayoundaha lmamu kana ka nasina posaanna bruru.
S.PHON: daħa du dajoundaħa lmamu kana ka nasina posaanna bɾuɾu.
S.FORM: daha du dayoundaha lmamu kana ka nasina posaanna bruru.
S.PHON: daħa du dajoundaħa lmamu kana ka nasina posaanna bɾuɾu.

TRANSL.notes: 一個(沒幫忙).然後兩個幫忙檢他所有的梨子然後放在籃子裡.

S.TRANSL: 一個 .然後兩個幫忙檢他所有的梨子然後放在籃子裡.

TRANSL.notes: The one (does not help him.) Then the other two help him pick up all of his pears and put them in the basket.

S.TRANSL: The one Then the other two help him pick up all of his pears and put them in the basket.

S.FORM: posaundaha bruru ma tutuyundaha ka laqi kii di.
S.PHON: posaundaħa bɾuɾu ma tutujundaħa ka laqi kii di.
S.FORM: posaundaha bruru ma tutuyundaha ka laqi kii di.
S.PHON: posaundaħa bɾuɾu ma tutujundaħa ka laqi kii di.
S.TRANSL: 放在籃子裡,然後把那個小孩扶起來.
They put the pears in the basket, and then raise that child up.

S.FORM: ma tutuyundaha ka ruluna duri.
S.PHON: ma tutujundaħa ka ɾuluna duɾi.
S.FORM: ma tutuyundaha ka ruluna duri.
S.PHON: ma tutujundaħa ka ɾuluna duɾi.
S.TRANSL: 他們又幫忙把腳踏車扶起來.
Also they help to raise the bike too.

S.FORM: ma dmayo posaun dayounna laqi kii posaundaha kana nasina posaunna bobo rulu.
S.PHON: ma dmajo posaun dajounna laqi kii posaundaħa kana nasina posaunna bobo ɾulu.
S.FORM: ma dmayo posaun dayounna laqi kii posaundaha kana nasina posaunna bobo rulu.
S.PHON: ma dmajo posaun dajounna laqi kii posaundaħa kana nasina posaunna bobo ɾulu.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們幫那個小孩把他所有的梨子放在腳踏車上.
Then they help that child put all of his pears on the bike.

S.FORM: kiya ka wa ini kesa mhue ka laqi ah mntakun kii duri.
S.PHON: kija ka wa ini kesa mħue ka laqi aħ mntakun kii duɾi.
S.FORM: kiya ka wa ini kesa mhue ka laqi ah mntakun kii duri.
S.PHON: kija ka wa ini kesa mħue ka laqi aħ mntakun kii duɾi.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個跌倒的小孩也沒有說謝謝.
Then, that child who just falls does not say "thank you" either.

S.FORM: ma wada ka teru laqi kii di.
S.PHON: ma wada ka teɾu laqi kii di.
S.FORM: ma wada ka teru laqi kii di.
S.PHON: ma wada ka teɾu laqi kii di.
S.TRANSL: 然後那三個小孩離開了.
The three children leave.

S.FORM: ma laqi mntakun kii wada naq ah mhedu naq posa rulu wada nax wada naq di.
S.PHON: ma laqi mntakun kii wada naq aħ mħedu naq posa ɾulu wada nax wada naq di.
S.FORM: ma laqi mntakun kii wada naq ah mhedu naq posa rulu wada nax wada naq di.
S.PHON: ma laqi mntakun kii wada naq aħ mħedu naq posa ɾulu wada nax wada naq di.
S.TRANSL: 然後跌倒的那個男孩自己離開了... 他自己把腳踏車放好... 自己離開了.
Then that child who just falls leaves by himself... placing the bike by himself... and leaving by himself.

S.FORM: ma ini q qnte ini ktheya nodaandaha mkesa laqi ah ah teru rseno kii qitaandaha elu cceka hii ka bunuhna.
S.PHON: ma ini q qnte ini ktħeja nodaandaħa mkesa laqi aħ aħ teɾu ɾseno kii qitaandaħa elu ʦʦeka ħii ka bunuħna.
S.FORM: ma ini q qnte ini ktheya nodaandaha mkesa laqi ah ah teru rseno kii qitaandaha elu cceka hii ka bunuhna.
S.PHON: ma ini q qnte ini ktħeja nodaandaħa mkesa laqi aħ aħ teɾu ɾseno kii qitaandaħa elu ʦʦeka ħii ka bunuħna.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們路走不遠,那三個男孩在路中間看到他的帽子.
Then not walking too far, the three boys see his hat in the middle of the road.

S.FORM: bunuh we kesaun bosi kari nihongo.
S.PHON: bunuħ we kesaun bosi kaɾi niħoŋo.
S.FORM: bunuh we kesaun bosi kari nihongo.
S.PHON: bunuħ we kesaun bosi kaɾi niħoŋo.
S.TRANSL: 'bunuh'用日語稱為'bosi'.
"Bunuh" is called "bosi" in Japanese.

S.FORM: qitaandaha ah ceka elu hii ka bunuhna ma angalundaha we sa.
S.PHON: qitaandaħa aħ ʦeka elu ħii ka bunuħna ma aŋalundaħa we sa.
S.FORM: qitaandaha ah ceka elu hii ka bunuhna ma angalundaha we sa.
S.PHON: qitaandaħa aħ ʦeka elu ħii ka bunuħna ma aŋalundaħa we sa.
S.TRANSL: 看到他的帽子在路中間,然後他們撿起來說「wee!」.
Seeing his hat on the road, they take his hat and say "wee!".

S.FORM: ah bunuhsu nii kesaunna tumu.
S.PHON: aħ bunuħsu nii kesaunna tumu.
S.FORM: ah bunuhsu nii kesaunna tumu.
S.PHON: aħ bunuħsu nii kesaunna tumu.
S.TRANSL: 他說「這是你的帽子嗎?」
He says "is this your hat?".

S.FORM: tut ah ini mita bukuy ka riso ah mhm taapa rulu kii ma ah ma bosi mo ma tub bunuhmu mesa.
S.PHON: tut aħ ini mita bukuj ka ɾiso aħ mħm taapa ɾulu kii ma aħ ma bosi mo ma tub bunuħmu mesa.
S.FORM: tut ah ini mita bukuy ka riso ah mhm taapa rulu kii ma ah ma bosi mo ma tub bunuhmu mesa.
S.PHON: tut aħ ini mita bukuj ka ɾiso aħ mħm taapa ɾulu kii ma aħ ma bosi mo ma tub bunuħmu mesa.
S.TRANSL: 然後騎腳踏車的男孩看背後... 然後帽子然後... 說「我的帽子.」
Then the boy who rides the bike looks back at the hat, and says "my hat".

S.FORM: kiya ka haducundaha heya ka bunuhna ma eh so mesa mhue bale megenamu ah bunuh yaku mesa ka riso ah laqi rseno kii ma kiya ka mangan teru nasi sbegena deheya peni.
S.PHON: kija ka ħaduʦundaħa ħeja ka bunuħna ma eħ so mesa mħue bale megenamu aħ bunuħ jaku mesa ka ɾiso aħ laqi ɾseno kii ma kija ka maŋan teɾu nasi sbegena deħeja peni.
S.FORM: kiya ka haducundaha heya ka bunuhna ma eh so mesa mhue bale megenamu ah bunuh yaku mesa ka riso ah laqi rseno kii ma kiya ka mangan teru nasi sbegena deheya peni.
S.PHON: kija ka ħaduʦundaħa ħeja ka bunuħna ma eħ so mesa mħue bale megenamu aħ bunuħ jaku mesa ka ɾiso aħ laqi ɾseno kii ma kija ka maŋan teɾu nasi sbegena deħeja peni.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們送他的帽子給那個男孩.那個男孩好像說你們心地真好給我帽子. 他是這麼樣的,他拿三個梨子送給他們.
They send the boy his hat. The boy seems to say "thank you very much for returning me the hat.". Then he gives three pears to them.

S.FORM: ga mqaras deheya duri kiya ka wada deheya di.
S.PHON: ga mqaɾas deħeja duɾi kija ka wada deħeja di.
S.FORM: ga mqaras deheya duri kiya ka wada deheya di.
S.PHON: ga mqaɾas deħeja duɾi kija ka wada deħeja di.
S.TRANSL: 他們也很高興.
They are happy too.

S.FORM: wada deheya di ini qbsyaq wada ka riso taapa rulu duri ma teru riso nii dehuk pusu qhuni hii qu qhuni nasi.
S.PHON: wada deħeja di ini qbsjaq wada ka ɾiso taapa ɾulu duɾi ma teɾu ɾiso nii deħuk pusu qħuni ħii qu qħuni nasi.
S.FORM: wada deheya di ini qbsyaq wada ka riso taapa rulu duri ma teru riso nii dehuk pusu qhuni hii qu qhuni nasi.
S.PHON: wada deħeja di ini qbsjaq wada ka ɾiso taapa ɾulu duɾi ma teɾu ɾiso nii deħuk pusu qħuni ħii qu qħuni nasi.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們離開了,不久之後騎腳踏車的男孩也離開了.然後這三個男孩到達樹根... 到達梨子樹.
Then they leave. In a short while, and so does the boy who rides the bike. Then these three boys arrive at the tree... pear tree root there.

S.FORM: ma moda ssiyo baki hii wa naq baro baki nana ma moda hiya ka teru riso so hari ini kqita di wada naq wada ma mkesa hiya ka laq teru laqi kii.
S.PHON: ma moda ssijo baki ħii wa naq baɾo baki nana ma moda ħija ka teɾu ɾiso so ħaɾi ini kqita di wada naq wada ma mkesa ħija ka laq teɾu laqi kii.
S.FORM: ma moda ssiyo baki hii wa naq baro baki nana ma moda hiya ka teru riso so hari ini kqita di wada naq wada ma mkesa hiya ka laq teru laqi kii.
S.PHON: ma moda ssijo baki ħii wa naq baɾo baki nana ma moda ħija ka teɾu ɾiso so ħaɾi ini kqita di wada naq wada ma mkesa ħija ka laq teɾu laqi kii.

TRANSL.notes: 然後三個男孩經過那裡(老人所在處),那三個小孩沒四處看,就離開...走開了.

S.TRANSL: 然後三個男孩經過那裡 ,那三個小孩沒四處看,就離開...走開了.
Then the three boys pass by the old man who is still up alone. The three children do not look around and they leave... they just walk away.

S.FORM: ma ah hmuwa di.
S.PHON: ma aħ ħmuwa di.
S.FORM: ma ah hmuwa di.
S.PHON: ma aħ ħmuwa di.
S.TRANSL: 然後那是什麼?
Then, what is that?

S.FORM: wa wada wada ka teru laqi kii di ma rudan nii meyah kiya.
S.PHON: wa wada wada ka teɾu laqi kii di ma ɾudan nii mejaħ kija.
S.FORM: wa wada wada ka teru laqi kii di ma rudan nii meyah kiya.
S.PHON: wa wada wada ka teɾu laqi kii di ma ɾudan nii mejaħ kija.
S.TRANSL: 他們離開了... 那三個小孩離開然後這老人來.
they leave... those three children leave and this old man comes down.

S.FORM: stenge llnabuna nasi ah lubuyna di ma.
S.PHON: steŋe llnabuna nasi aħ lubujna di ma.
S.FORM: stenge llnabuna nasi ah lubuyna di ma.
S.PHON: steŋe llnabuna nasi aħ lubujna di ma.
S.TRANSL: 啊,那個老人來了,把梨子裝在袋子裡,滿滿的.
Yeah, the old man just comes down. He puts the pears into bags, and they are full.

S.FORM: meyah kndalax qhuni baro ka baki kii di ma baki rudan kesaunna baki kii meyah du ma meyah hatang murey mposa rawa nasina di ma so hari mesa i wada inu kiyan rawamu di mesa.
S.PHON: mejaħ kndalax qħuni baɾo ka baki kii di ma baki ɾudan kesaunna baki kii mejaħ du ma mejaħ ħataŋ muɾej mposa ɾawa nasina di ma so ħaɾi mesa i wada inu kijan ɾawamu di mesa.
S.FORM: meyah kndalax qhuni baro ka baki kii di ma baki rudan kesaunna baki kii meyah du ma meyah hatang murey mposa rawa nasina di ma so hari mesa i wada inu kiyan rawamu di mesa.
S.PHON: mejaħ kndalax qħuni baɾo ka baki kii di ma baki ɾudan kesaunna baki kii mejaħ du ma mejaħ ħataŋ muɾej mposa ɾawa nasina di ma so ħaɾi mesa i wada inu kijan ɾawamu di mesa.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人從樹上來.那個老人說... 那個老人來然後來... 他本想把他的梨子放在籃子.他好像是說「我的籃子在哪裡?」
That old man comes down the tree. He says... that old man comes and comes... he thinks that he has put his pears in the basket. He seems like saying "Where is my basket?".

S.FORM: so hari smepu bagana mesa w teru han ma daha bale di ke lmngelung baki kii wada inu kingan a rawa wa rawa nasimu di mesa.
S.PHON: so ħaɾi smepu bagana mesa w teɾu ħan ma daħa bale di ke lmŋeluŋ baki kii wada inu kiŋan a ɾawa wa ɾawa nasimu di mesa.
S.FORM: so hari smepu bagana mesa w teru han ma daha bale di ke lmngelung baki kii wada inu kingan a rawa wa rawa nasimu di mesa.
S.PHON: so ħaɾi smepu bagana mesa w teɾu ħan ma daħa bale di ke lmŋeluŋ baki kii wada inu kiŋan a ɾawa wa ɾawa nasimu di mesa.
S.TRANSL: 他好像用手數算... 本來有三個,但只有兩個.他想「一個籃子... 我的一籃梨子去哪裡?」
He seems to count by hand... there should be three but here are only two of them. He thinks "Where did the other pear basket go?".

S.FORM: ma bale wadaku qnuuqu mrengo ma ka teru laqi kii moda hii di ma.
S.PHON: ma bale wadaku qnuuqu mɾeŋo ma ka teɾu laqi kii moda ħii di ma.
S.FORM: ma bale wadaku qnuuqu mrengo ma ka teru laqi kii moda hii di ma.
S.PHON: ma bale wadaku qnuuqu mɾeŋo ma ka teɾu laqi kii moda ħii di ma.
S.TRANSL: 真的,我錯了.怎麼會呢?
It is true. I get it wrong. But how come?

S.FORM: mita ba baki kii.
S.PHON: mita ba baki kii.
S.FORM: mita ba baki kii.
S.PHON: mita ba baki kii.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩經過那裡的時候,他們看到那個老人.
Those three children, when passing there, see that old man.

S.FORM: mita teru laqi kii peni ma mesa mita ye uxe deheya wada gmeeguy di mesa ka baki kii lmngelung na naq.
S.PHON: mita teɾu laqi kii peni ma mesa mita je uxe deħeja wada gmeeguj di mesa ka baki kii lmŋeluŋ na naq.
S.FORM: mita teru laqi kii peni ma mesa mita ye uxe deheya wada gmeeguy di mesa ka baki kii lmngelung na naq.
S.PHON: mita teɾu laqi kii peni ma mesa mita je uxe deħeja wada gmeeguj di mesa ka baki kii lmŋeluŋ na naq.
S.TRANSL: 看到那三個小孩... 說看到... 那個老人還在想說「是不是他們偷了我的梨子?」
Seeing those three children, that old man himself thinks "Did they steal my pears?".

S.FORM: ma ini qita heya ka teru laqi kii duri ma wada naq kiya.
S.PHON: ma ini qita ħeja ka teɾu laqi kii duɾi ma wada naq kija.
S.FORM: ma ini qita heya ka teru laqi kii duri ma wada naq kiya.
S.PHON: ma ini qita ħeja ka teɾu laqi kii duɾi ma wada naq kija.
S.TRANSL: 所以那三個小孩不看他就離開了.
So those three children do not see him and just go on.

S.FORM: so mesa wada ma so hari wada uka kingan rawa nasimu mesa ka baki kii so nii na wada naq ka teru laqi de baki.
S.PHON: so mesa wada ma so ħaɾi wada uka kiŋan ɾawa nasimu mesa ka baki kii so nii na wada naq ka teɾu laqi de baki.
S.FORM: so mesa wada ma so hari wada uka kingan rawa nasimu mesa ka baki kii so nii na wada naq ka teru laqi de baki.
S.PHON: so mesa wada ma so ħaɾi wada uka kiŋan ɾawa nasimu mesa ka baki kii so nii na wada naq ka teɾu laqi de baki.
S.TRANSL: 然後好像... 然後好像那個老人在想「我一籃梨子不見了」的時候,那三個小孩就離開了.
Then it seems... then it seems that that old man says "There is one basket missing," when the three child leave.

S.FORM: wada so kiya nii mhedu nii kari ah kesaunna ahah kesaun nasi ka kndaan nasi betaq hini mhuesu.
S.PHON: wada so kija nii mħedu nii kaɾi aħ kesaunna aħaħ kesaun nasi ka kndaan nasi betaq ħini mħuesu.
S.FORM: wada so kiya nii mhedu nii kari ah kesaunna ahah kesaun nasi ka kndaan nasi betaq hini mhuesu.
S.PHON: wada so kija nii mħedu nii kaɾi aħ kesaunna aħaħ kesaun nasi ka kndaan nasi betaq ħini mħuesu.
S.TRANSL: 然後到這裡,故事... 說梨子的故事結束了.謝謝你.
So it is the end. This pear story is finished. Thank you.
